title: Chapter 126 – Samadhi True Fire (6)
content:
Not only Blade Fist Demon, who had heard the insult firsthand, but many of the Thirteen Evil Sects warriors either snickered or wore masks of indifference.

Jeong Yeon-shin's words were shocking.

No one in all of vast Sichuan would dare speak to Blade Fist Demon that way.

Even counting every local martial artist, it would be difficult to find someone willing to try.

Talk of corpses was something only Pure Demon Alliance warriors whispered among themselves.

That atmosphere was evident in the murmurs spreading like storm clouds.

Mostly merchants well-versed in martial affairs and local martial artists.

"His bearing seems quite extraordinary... but his words go too far."

"Isn't he from Desolate Fortress? No wonder he looks down on Sichuan's sky."

Mocking words abounded. This was characteristic of isolated regional murim like Sichuan.

They were said to be exclusive even apart from the orthodox paths, often showing open arrogance toward the Central Plains martial world beyond Shu Road.

The boy thought: what of it?

That was when it happened.

"His words are too harsh? Just look at all the evil these Thirteen Evil Sects trash commit!"

"Did you lose your parents to the Soul-Sucking Demon Art? If so, you wouldn't be spouting such nonsense. You can't even distinguish between heaven and earth."

A boy's voice and a girl's. The Tang siblings were perched on the walls of Desolate Fortress's Sichuan branch.

They had poked their heads out to watch Jeong Yeon-shin's fight, but couldn't stomach the sight of Sichuan commoners defending the Thirteen Evil Sects.

The siblings had recently gained fame as exceptional talents.

Those who lived closely with Sichuan's murim necessarily kept track of appearances by the Tang Clan's direct line.

Like memorizing which lands were prone to landslides and earthquakes.

Naturally, some recognized them.

"Poison Dragon and Phoenix...?"

"Yes. I've seen them before."

"Why would such precious young masters be at the Desolate Fortress branch?"

Whispers spread. The Tang Clan was formidable, being one of the Eight Great Families. They were renowned as a righteous faction.

They possessed the kind of power that made people reconsider their actions.

The atmosphere shifted palpably after the Tang siblings shouted.

The stance of many in the crowd shifted from rejection to observation.

A sense of curiosity settled over everything instead. Their thoughts were plain enough to read.

What can this boy do? How far can the ambition of this young swordsman reach?

Jeong Yeon-shin didn't bother looking back.

Though he vaguely felt the siblings' small sighs brush the back of his head, the boy had been measuring the distance to the supreme masters since before he ever mentioned corpses.

'Two leaders.'

He counted those who needed to die.

Ten Perfections Sect's Fierce Sword and Pure Demon Alliance's Blade Fist Demon.

They were lofty beings at the realm of supreme masters. Not the type to immediately resort to joint attacks in front of so many onlookers.

For masters, they said, a warrior's honor sometimes substituted for practical benefit.

In a world where titles were fame.

With one boy stepping forward and announcing his presence, they couldn't pass through the gate without first breaking through Jeong Yeon-shin alone.

It was a good opportunity.

'Murim Alliance, Eight Families, year of famine, Thirteen Evil Sects...'

Jeong Yeon-shin recalled the names while eyeing Desolate Fortress.

If he cut down the vanguard of Ten Perfections Sect and Pure Demon Alliance here, it would deal them a near-fatal blow.

The boy's martial prowess could now calculate that far. He had reached such a position.

"The young swordsman has created a battlefield. Zhang Fei and Liu Bei would be proud."

A voice tinged with laughter.

From the left. Spear Axe Sword was smiling as if amused. He was the youth accompanying Ten Perfections Sect's Fierce Sword.

His spear, the axe on his back, and the sword guard at his waist gleamed noisily, but like Fierce Sword, his qi was calm.

They said such ones were often more fearsome.

Jeong Yeon-shin glanced at him, then turned his head again. Like dismissing something trivial.

His gaze was fully on Pure Demon Alliance's Blade Fist Demon, who stood with his arms lowered.

The boy stared at him intently.

'Blade Fist Demon. Definitely black-rank by Desolate Fortress standards. I heard he's counted among Pure Demon Alliance's top masters.'

A strange aura. Had he sensed the Luminous Wheel That Transcends Law?

Jeong Yeon-shin paid it no mind and stepped forward. The luminous wheel was spinning even without Bodhidharma's spiritual energy.

The light emanating from his heart was warm.

Step.

The firmly trodden ground made a small sound. Sand grains scattered beneath his feet.

He had raised his energy. The true qi spreading from his bubbling well point was creating waves.

These were the energy waves of the Luminous Wheel That Transcends Law Technique.

He had already observed everything.

He had clearly imprinted Blade Fist Demon and Sword Demon's muscle conditions and stances, their qi waves.

How they would use their bodies was being drawn in his mind.

His upper dantian, approaching death, harmonized with the Luminous Wheel That Transcends Law Technique to create peerless ability.

Snap!

"Step back."

Blade Fist Demon spoke briefly. To his subordinates.

Whoosh!

The distance closed at extreme speed.

Jeong Yeon-shin's footwork, honed through the fury in the City of Renowned Craftsmen, now cut through space like a drawn blade given human form.

The wind seemed to visibly distort.

"...!"

Hum.

A sword cry rang out amid everyone's shock. The Desolate sword in the boy's grip emerged from its scabbard.

It was a sword draw accompanied by light. The upward diagonal strike flashed like lightning.

Clang!

Blade Fist Demon's elbow slammed down on the blade's surface. The sword brushed his abdomen as it passed, drawing a line of blood.

Jeong Yeon-shin's gaze sharpened. The response was remarkable.

'Strong.'

He had heard of him.

They called him Blade Demon for wielding blades like a devil. Also Fist Demon for his mastery of fists.

That was how the title Blade Fist Demon came about. He was Pure Demon Alliance's main force. His fame reached across the world.

Jeong Yeon-shin paid it no mind. He had appeared in the murim wearing a black robe. This was no place for defeat.

Tap.

He stepped forward with the foot that had been supporting him. The roar of wind still thundered in his ears.

The moment he dove in without fearing close range, his footwork naturally transformed into true steps.

He planted himself firmly. The sensation of earth force piercing up through his ankle. After the right fist comes the left hand technique.

Together with the verses of the Eternal Blossom Fist, the wheel in his heart spewed light.

'Advancing Thunder.'

It extended from below his vision. The straight-line power fist's energy wave shook the air before Jeong Yeon-shin.

*Crack!*

He felt something yield beneath his fist.

The auspicious true qi of the Luminous Wheel That Transcends Law unraveled and pierced the enemy's protective inner force armor.

The sensation was unmistakable. The fist strike broke ribs and raked the enemy's side... At the same time, he felt it at his ears. Natural shock disrupting the enemy's breath.

As long as they had cultivated demonic techniques, any master would struggle against Jeong Yeon-shin. Only the Pure Demon Alliance Leader could gain an advantage over him.

'Let's end it here.'

Perhaps because he was born with a short life, Jeong Yeon-shin preferred short, decisive battles.

It might also have been due to his talent for analyzing and predicting his opponent's techniques.

Swoosh.

"Ugh...!"

Whether groan or battle cry was unclear.

When Blade Fist Demon brought down his left fist, the boy's right fingertips were already brushing down the sword guard of the Desolate sword.

He changed his qi form naturally, like flowing water. It happened in an instant.

With the Desolate sword in the air, he completely reversed his grip on the handle. The sword point still faced forward.

It was the grip method of the reverse sword.

He pulled up while holding it that way. The distance was close enough to embrace his opponent.

The rising blade caught Blade Fist Demon's arm. It was a single moment. He extended straight upward, carrying sword energy waves with him.

Whoosh! Clang!

The left arm fell amid a spray of blood, and one fist struck powerfully, aiming to crush Jeong Yeon-shin's shoulder.

Whoosh!

The fist strike's energy waves were tremendous.

Jeong Yeon-shin's gradually growing hair scattered backward. It felt like a blade wind striking his eyes.

But there was no great impact. The demonic technique's energy waves dissipated before the faintly white qi shield of the Luminous Wheel That Transcends Law Technique.

Even though Jeong Yeon-shin's defensive skills were still shallow.

Blade Fist Demon's eyes widened as if they would tear.

It was his final expression.

Destroying Evil, Revealing Truth. The energy that shatters demonic paths and manifests righteous principles surged back up against his fist strike.

Blade Fist Demon's body momentarily froze. He was paralyzed.

By then, Jeong Yeon-shin had already lifted the sword's energy slightly to re-establish a proper grip on the handle.

Blade Fist Demon's pupils shifted sideways. He seemed to sense the change in grip with terrible accuracy. But it was too late.

Slash!

The blade carved horizontally across his neck. A snow-white trajectory blazed like lightning.

Blood drops scattered at the tip of the Desolate sword as it tore through that instant.

Blade Fist Demon.

Could not overcome the countering divine technique.

Jeong Yeon-shin turned around at the sound of something falling.

As the corpse tried to drape across his back, he gently pushed it away with the back of his hand, and a heavier sound followed.

"..."

The street fell silent. Spear Axe Sword's eyes, which had spoken of creating a battlefield, shook violently.

Blade Fist Demon hadn't even drawn his blade once.

The body said to be tempered with extreme external techniques couldn't withstand three sword strikes. It was a fight that brought silence.

For the boy, it was an expected outcome.

'Fortunate. I can begin after taking out one leader.'

Jeong Yeon-shin thought while lightly swinging his sword to shake off the blood.

He had aimed to break Pure Demon Alliance's vanguard first.

Since only he knew the full capability of the Luminous Wheel That Transcends Law Technique, he had believed he could win a life-and-death battle with certainty. And he had succeeded.

In this moment, he had cut down nearly thirty percent of the enemy's fighting power.

'Annihilation is the best option.'

They were demonic path rabble. Thinking of Desolate Fortress's future with so many enemies, it was right to sever the limbs of major enemy sects.

The elite masters of both major sects had already died in the City of Renowned Craftsmen.

Pure Demon Divine Hand and Sword Scorpion had led them. The enemies here now should be considered replacement forces.

If they vanished too, the Thirteen Evil Sects would no longer be thirteen.

'So this is it.'

Jeong Yeon-shin suddenly grasped the symbolism and role of Desolate Fortress's black rank.

They were decisive battle masters who could face the leaders of major sect elite groups alone, and when fortune favored them, could deliver fatal strikes.

It meant directly affecting enormous groups that acted as local powers all across the world.

"What..."

"Monstrous power."

"Blade Fist Demon in one exchange...!"

They said supreme masters' exchanges of technique appear as a single move to ordinary eyes.

A space so crowded that hundreds of breaths could be felt in one inhale and exhale.

The gazes fixed on Jeong Yeon-shin completely changed. Fear and awe intertwined. The temperature was different.

On one side, Pure Demon Alliance's masters were revealing abyss-like energy.

Many smiles had disappeared. But they didn't retreat.

Slowly.

They approached Jeong Yeon-shin one step at a time, their oppressive energy flowing as one, as if using formation techniques.

They were truly demons. The atmosphere felt like a wall had been erected.

"He was meant to become Desolate Fortress's divine sword. As you saw, don't treat him as a boy. Someone's words were right. He is a monster."

Ten Perfections Sect's Sword Demon muttered. Spear Axe Sword kept his mouth shut.

Jeong Yeon-shin's pupils alternated between them and Pure Demon Alliance.

He could handle about one of the two groups here.

Even with Fierce Sword remaining, it would work somehow if he were prepared to die. Because he now wore Ma Jin's robe.

But he couldn't handle them all at once. The boy's realm was still at the stage of solidifying the black rank.

Meaning he was insufficient to face joint attacks.

Ten Perfections Sect.

Sword-like qi waves were also sprouting from their side.

Following Pure Demon Alliance, they seemed to be preparing to charge in immediately, having come to regard Jeong Yeon-shin as a great enemy.

They had decided it was no longer a situation for saving face.

The Radiant Demon Wing seniors lying in sickbeds might rush out with Body Protection Technique.

'That won't do.'

Radiant Demon Wing was already near the point of no recovery. Their forces were halved. That was precisely why the remaining seniors' qi regulation was even more critical.

Therefore.

Other means had to be devised.

Boom! Hum!

It echoed from all directions. The vibrations of true steps and sword sounds tickled his clothes.

Jeong Yeon-shin spun quickly, scanning in every direction.

Following a nod, the boy's eyes flashed with white light.

A line formed in his mind, etched into his vision. It was time to swing the sword.

The demons rushing in with various weapons had lost their composure.

Pure Demon Alliance's Blade Fist Demon. They had lost a supreme master who was teacher or senior brother before their very eyes. Pure Demon Alliance's remnants were now vengeful spirits.

'One sword.'

He gripped his sword guard firmly. It was the moment he thought to imbue his will into the blade.

His mind moved forward along the sword. Together with true qi. The Desolate sword was calling him.

With sword force blooming together with the Luminous Wheel That Transcends Law Technique.

He planted himself firmly on the ground and swung his sword while turning halfway. It was a horizontal strike. A snow-white light stream drew an arc.

It felt immensely solid, even though he had extended it himself.

Clang!

It completely shattered the weapons in the demonic warriors' hands. The swords and spears thrust by Pure Demon Alliance's masters crumbled and fell.

The sword strike that rushed in a half-moon shape distorted in white light.

Their shocked gasps were unmistakable. Jeong Yeon-shin extended his opposite hand while turning with the Desolate sword.

It wasn't over yet. The enemies were still many, and the boy had the means to break through the situation.

Hum!

It was a sound ringing from within. The wheel in his heart was spinning fiercely.

He operated different verses through the Lesser Palace and Labor Palace acupoints in the center of his left palm.

It was absorption and emission. Along with the qi operation of drawing in and expelling, the luminous wheel's vortex poured outward, riding his left hand's acupoints.

His arm stung momentarily. The energy waves were tremendous.

'Got it.'

The fragments of the shattered weapons were caught in a small gesture.

Iron pieces soared through the clear sky, drawing a galaxy across the distant heavens.

Cold petals bloomed, etched against the blue.

They scattered sunlight in the sky. The sun's rays pierced through the gaps in the net of dark energy.

Myriad Heavens Flower Rain.

Without even a secret manual.

He manifested with his fingertips the divine technique he had only heard passed down orally.

The pinnacle of complex and varied martial arts, transformed into art.

In this moment, the crowd fell silent rather than speaking. It was a silence filled with awe.

In the complete stillness, metal fragments swept around him. As if protecting the boy.

Groans began to ring out from all directions.

The fragments landed, breaking the crowns, shoulders, bridges of noses, and arms of those standing near Jeong Yeon-shin.

Blood sprayed along with the shower of light rays.

In the center of it all.

The boy thought.

'Tang Clan.'

They were cunning ones. Even after arriving in Sichuan, they hid with concealment techniques to observe.

Perhaps they only half-believed the Tang siblings' letter. If that was truly the case, he just needed to demonstrate it before their eyes.

So he showed them.

The effect was immediate. Strong qi waves could be felt from various pavilions along the roads stretching north, east, and west.

They were the ones who had been faintly concealing themselves.

"Tang Clan. I know you're here."

Jeong Yeon-shin parted his lips quietly.

Now he understood the value of Desolate Fortress's black rank. It was a level where his words and actions carried weight.

"As an orthodox sect, you should restrain these Ten Perfections Sect scum."

The boy spoke slowly from the center of the swirling storm of steel flowers.

As his pitch-black robe hem fluttered, Jeong Yeon-shin concluded his words unhurriedly.

"Let Pure Demon Alliance come to me."

His calm voice rang out, distinct and alone.
